coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 11:15 at 70%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 92% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 23:15 at 92%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/3. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/3. 23:15 at 92%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 23:15 at 92%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/3. 6:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 55-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 6:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 6:00. Then 34min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 6:00. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 3/3. 54% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 92% × 23:15. Then 11min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 23:15 at 92%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 92% for 23:15. Then 11min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 92% × 23:15. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 85% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 85% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 85% into session. 55%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
